title: Open Day Summer 2026 — Supercar Showcase in Jávea
excerpt: Join The Garage Jávea for an exclusive summer open day: live diagnostics demos, a curated supercar showcase, and free import & ITV advice with our multilingual team.
author: The Garage Team
metaTitle: Open Day Summer 2026 | The Garage Jávea
metaDescription: An exclusive summer open day at The Garage Jávea with live diagnostics, a supercar showcase, and free import & ITV advice on the Costa Blanca.
body:
## You are invited to our Summer Open Day

This summer we open the doors of our Jávea facility for a relaxed afternoon dedicated to everything that makes premium motoring on the Costa Blanca a pleasure. Whether you own a track-ready Porsche, are considering importing a classic, or simply love beautiful machinery, you are welcome.

### What to expect

- **Live OEM-level diagnostics demos** on the same dealer-grade equipment we use every day.
- A **curated showcase** of supercars currently in our care and available stock.
- **Free, no-obligation advice** on Spanish import (matriculación), ITV preparation and de-registration.
- Refreshments and a chance to meet our multilingual team in person.

### Practical details

The open day takes place at our workshop on Carrer de Augusta in Jávea. Entry is free, but places for the live diagnostics sessions are limited. Reserve your slot by phone or via the inquiry form on our website.

We look forward to welcoming you and sharing a coffee at our showroom.
